negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for james_lunch_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~appears_in_company_today(james)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_at_home(X0) | works_remotely_from_home(X0)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    works_remotely_from_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_lunch_in_company(james)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    has_lunch_at_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~works_remotely_from_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define schedules_meeting_with_customers(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_company_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_other_countries(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define employee(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
